---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement to an existing one
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: simonives
---

> **Note:** For early-stage ideas, start a [Discussion](https://github.com/simonives/rainkeeper/discussions/categories/ideas) first.
> Feature requests here should be reasonably well-defined.

**What Raindrop.io capability would you like exposed?**
Link to the relevant API docs if available: https://developer.raindrop.io

**Describe the tool or change**
What would it do? What parameters would it take?

**Why is this useful?**
What workflow does it enable or improve?

**Alternatives considered**
Is there a workaround using existing tools? Why isn't it sufficient?

**Notes**
Any implementation considerations, edge cases, or API quirks worth flagging.
